name: Harness docs (harness_engine)
description: Wire-harness manufacturing docs from the open board: wire list CSV, WireViz YAML, panel wiring diagram SVG.
description_full: Treats the PCB as a 1:1 panel/harness wiring layout and generates manufacturing documentation from it: a point-to-point wire list (CSV) with gauges, colors and routed cut lengths; WireViz YAML for a harness diagram + BOM; and a panel wiring-diagram SVG with device outlines, wire-colored runs and wire-number flags. Wire types come from net class names, multi-conductor cables from named group buses, cut lengths from routed tracks. Includes the 'Panel device' footprint wizard for fast 2D device footprints. Wire numbers persist across re-exports via wire_numbers.json. No third-party Python packages required.
